title: Case study — Atelier
summary: Self-hostable OSS project template + agent interop protocol + reference prototype for mixed human/agent teams. PUBLIC repo (github.com/nino-chavez/atelier).

strategy.decision: Lead the AI-products cluster with atelier — it's PUBLIC, externally verifiable, and embodies the 'methodology-as-software' thesis. Five compositions: hero-case-study (problem + live link) → schematic (atelier-12-tool-mcp radial) → agentic-approach-readout (3 cards on protocol design / agent coordination / reference prototype) → quotable-artifact-block (pulled directly from the README or ADR) → outcome-readout.
strategy.why: ADR-0009 cluster IA lists atelier as the lead deep-dive for ai-products (its PUBLIC status makes it the credibility anchor). The schematic-diagram signature (ADR-0004) requires per-case schematics — atelier's 12-tool MCP architecture is the load-bearing visual for this slug.
strategy.shipped: v2 /work/atelier — same case-study schema but flat (no cluster nesting), no schematic, no PUBLIC visibility badge surfaced.
strategy.gap: Proposed = nested /work/ai-products/atelier route + PUBLIC badge in hero + 12-tool MCP schematic; Shipped = flat /work/atelier with prose + outbound link only.
strategy.question: Is the 12-tool MCP schematic accurate against the current atelier codebase, or has it drifted? Verify against github.com/nino-chavez/atelier before ship.

currentState.summary: v2 case page with prose + outbound link to atelier.ninochavez.co. No schematic, no cluster nesting, no visibility badge.
currentState.annotation: Route changes from flat to nested. PUBLIC badge added per ADR-0009 enforcement. Schematic introduced per signature (ADR-0004).
